event.headline: Inspection surge reported at Harbor North cargo terminal
event.summary: Harbor North appears to have increased outbound cargo inspections after a security directive, with container delays reported by both a port bulletin and a shipping association update.

confidence.label: high
confidence.rationale: Two independent curated sources report matching inspection activity and delay symptoms.

claims.claimText: Outbound cargo inspections increased after a security directive.
Container processing delays reached three to five hours.
The port authority linked the delays to a short-term security review.

sources.title: Harbor North security review extends outbound inspections
sources.excerpt: Outbound containers are subject to enhanced screening through the morning shift.

sources.title: Members report cargo delays at Harbor North terminal
sources.excerpt: Shippers reported three to five hour processing delays tied to elevated inspection activity.

reviewActions.notes: Initial synthesized headline shortened for timeline readability.
